code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut product = 1
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = ""
  mut has = false
  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if has
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          product = product * v
        when None
          product = product
        end
        cur = ""
        has = false
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("product=#{product}")
end
